label: Fathom
description: Pull privacy-friendly web analytics data from Fathom using your API key and site ID.

form.title: Connect Fathom
form.subtitle: Paste your Fathom API key and 8-character site ID to start pulling analytics data.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Generate a Fathom API token from your account settings and supply the 8-character site ID from your dashboard URL. Quickest way to connect.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with a Fathom API Key

### Generate an API token

1. Log in to [Fathom](https://app.usefathom.com/) and click your account avatar in the top-right corner.
2. Go to **Account settings → API tokens**.
3. Click **Create token**, give it a memorable name like `Anton`, and click **Save**.
4. Copy the token immediately — Fathom only shows it once.
5. Paste it into the **API Key** field below.

### Find your Site ID

1. In the Fathom dashboard, click on the site you want Anton to access.
2. Look at the URL in your browser — it will contain an 8-character alphanumeric ID, e.g. `app.usefathom.com/sites/ABCD1234/...`
3. Copy that 8-character string and paste it into the **Site ID** field below.

### Notes

- The API token is shown only once at creation. If you lose it, delete the old token and create a new one.
- Each API token can access all sites in your account; the Site ID scopes Anton to a specific property.
- Fathom's API is rate-limited — avoid polling more frequently than once per minute.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found under Account settings → API tokens. Shown only once at creation.

fields.name: site_id
fields.label: Site ID
fields.description: The 8-character ID from your Fathom dashboard URL (e.g. app.usefathom.com/sites/ABCD1234/...).
